query: Find issues that have a merged closing PR linked on GitHub but are still open.
expected_behavior: Uses Signal 0 (gh api graphql query for closedByPullRequestsReferences with merged-state filter) as the highest-precedence signal.
Distinguishes between MERGED linked PRs (Signal 0 fires) and OPEN linked PRs (does NOT fire; routes to existing-pr-triage path instead).
Reports confidence 0.7 for issues with at least one merged in-repo linked PR (clears default --min-confidence 0.6 alone).
Surfaces the candidate list with per-issue PR-url evidence for the maintainer to review before any close action.
